verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I find myself needing you like I've never had before, In all of the darkness around me, Everyday my hunger's growing more. It's clear to me now, You are my only refuge, My port in a troubled sea, Help me to give my life completely to You And make me only what you want me to be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord just keep the flame burning in my heart, Light my way with the fire of Your Spirit, Keep the flame burning in my heart and let it spread to whoever comes near it Lord, just keep the flame burning in my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Children, He knows what you are going through, He suffered more than you'll ever know, He is drawing us closer and closer to him, He'll be back soon, woh, woh, you got to get ready to go
